str_to_translate: "All right, lad, show me what you’ve learned."
"Chin up and stand tall. You’re shieldbearers of the Aegis now!"
"Don't just wait for magic to happen. Go out and make your own!"
"Dosukoi! Let’s put it in the ground!"
"I only feel alive when I hear the wind whistling in my ears."
"I’ve a feeling we’re not in Kansas anymore."
"One day, I will show you the wonders of Avalon and the true might of the Fae realms."
"Push through the pain. Giving up would hurt far more."
"Stay on the path, they say. I make my own path!"
"Suspira's mines will soon run dry. Your precious Kelon will run dry."
"The form has been filled out incorrectly. Please make a new appointment tomorrow."
"The most effective way to do it, is to do it."
"This material does not seem to be affected by gravity. By harnessing the properties of this Aerolith, we could create flying ships and cities, and fly close to the clouds..."
"Want to play a game of headman-hunter-fox with me? I promise not to cheat!"
"We are the sentinels of the Skein, always keeping a finger on the pulse of nature."
